If the configured endpoint does not support dual-stack, dispatching the request MAY return an error.', 'type' => 'boolean', ], 'UseFIPS' => [ 'builtIn' => 'AWS::UseFIPS', 'required' => true, 'default' => false, 'documentation' => 'When true, send this request to the FIPS-compliant regional endpoint.
